# Rishabh Singh — Data Scientist | IIT Madras
> Data Scientist at Chryselys (Oct 2024 – present) specializing in time-series forecasting, mixed-effects models, Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM), and pharma commercial analytics. B.S. Data Science and Applications, IIT Madras, CGPA 7.89, Minor in Economics & Finance (Sep 2021 – Apr 2025). Open-source contributor to CPython (merged PR #134804), conda-build (merged PR #4782), and librosa (merged PR #1850).

## Identity
- Full name: Rishabh Singh
- Role: Data Scientist & AI Engineer
- Employer: Chryselys (Oct 2024 – present)
- Education: Indian Institute of Technology Madras — B.S. Data Science and Applications, CGPA 7.89, Sep 2021 – Apr 2025, Minor in Economics & Finance
- Prior experience: ML Engineer Intern, iNeuron.ai (Mar 2024 – Apr 2024)
- Location: Delhi, India
- Achievement: Rank-3, Codechef Competition

## Technical Skills
- Languages: Python, SQL, R, Bash, JavaScript
- ML & Analytics: Time Series Forecasting, Mixed-Effects Models (LME/LMM), Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM), scikit-learn, XGBoost, PyTorch, TensorFlow, NLP, LLM Pipelines, A/B Testing, Bayesian Inference, Feature Engineering
- Frameworks & Tools: Streamlit, Flask, FastAPI, Tableau, Databricks, Dataiku, PySpark, Git, Jupyter, Figma
- Cloud & Infra: Azure, AWS, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Docker, CI/CD, MLOps, REST APIs, ETL

## Open-Source Contributions
- CPython (Python's core interpreter): PR #134804 — merged. Systems-level Python contribution.
- conda-build (Anaconda): PR #4782 — merged. Package management improvement.
- librosa (audio ML library): PR #1850 — merged. Feature enhancement.

## Projects
1. Mixed-Effects Marketing Modeling: Hierarchical LME regression to quantify marketing campaign elasticity; decomposes global vs. channel-level effects for MMM and ROI optimization.
2. Audio Classification — UrbanSound8K: End-to-end deep learning pipeline; mel-spectrograms and MFCCs via Librosa; CNN trained with TensorFlow on UrbanSound8K benchmark.
3. Bloglite — Compass: Multi-user blogging platform with Flask, SQLAlchemy ORM, JWT authentication, full CRUD, RESTful API. Containerised and deployed.
4. Parking Management System: Live parking system deployed to production.
5. LLM YouTube Metadata Pipeline: End-to-end pipeline for extracting and processing YouTube metadata via LLM.
6. Kisan Dost: Agricultural information system.

## Blog (23 published articles on Medium and rishabhsingh.me)
Series 1 — "In a Minute" (11 posts): Dense, visual breakdowns of ML concepts. Topics include Transformer Architecture, SVMs & Kernel Trick, CNNs, Forecasting, Bayesian Learning, Confusion Matrix Metrics, Multiclass vs. Multilabel Classification, Scalars/Vectors/Matrices/Tensors, Linear Regression, Support Vector Machines, Confidence Intervals vs Prediction Intervals.
Series 2 — "Web Development" (4 posts): CORS in Flask, HTTP Methods, Lazy Loading, Flask Session Login.
Series 3 — "Python" (8 posts): Virtual environments, conda, requirements.txt, matrix multiplication, sets vs. lists performance, if __name__ == '__main__', List vs Set, converting programs to exe.
